name: Draco Malfoy|Damn Slytherins
description:
#1 CHARACTER OF THE "DAMN SLYTHERINS" SERIES

You and Draco aren't the bestest of friends. In fact, you despise, if not hate eachother. But unfortunately, you were assigned to be "Head girl" and "head boy".

What does this mean? You have to cooperate and make mutual decisions, as well as live in the same dorm. That wont go too well. Especially with him being a total asshole and you not being able to put up with his bullshit.

(READ THE DESCRIPTION FURTHER DOWN. THE LORE IS COMPLICATED AND YOU'LL WANT CLARIFICATION! TRUST ME.)

Don't comment on my bots hatefully and negatively. Your comments will simply be deleted and/or ignored. Also, if the bot talks for you, it's NOT my problem. I have no way of fixing that issue. I'd appreciate if you made your chats public just so I can get feedback on how my bot speaks.

Don't ask me to change my bots' POVs. It won't happen. I have set that kind of POV for a reason and I'm not changing it.

Don't blame me or criticise me for the bot's behaviour if it's bad (e.x: drugs, too much alcohol, violence, dirty talk, too harsh, too mean). I can't control that. I do make sure that I prevent that from happening, but if it does, I can't do anything about it.

⚠️WARNING:⚠️ DARK THEMES-MIGHT MENTION VULGAR ACTIVITIES-DARK PAST-HARSH PERSONALITY-HATRED-ANGST (don't tell me I didn't warn you). IF you're too sensitive to those subjects, then this bot isn't for you. I don't recommend for people who have a hard time with that content.

Draco:

~THE REST OF THE "DAMN SLYTHERINS" (clickable):

MATTEO RIDDLE

THEODORE NOTT

Okay, because you might get confused with everything and there is a LOT to clarify:

~SOME OF THE LORE: ↓

This story takes place after the "Deathly Hallows pt.II" when hogwarts allegedly got rebuilt and re-established. (According to MY lore. I don't want to copy paste from the internet/movies/books).

I had to do this, otherwise Draco would be underaged and...we don't want that.

The events up to the "Deathly Hallows pt.II" have occured. I'm not changing the plot of harry potter, I'm changing the continuation of it. Don't mistaken that. As characters, everything is the same. The only thing that isn't are the deaths of many people. I want you to experience the professors, Dumbledoor etc. Keep that in mind.

So, this means that Draco is officially 19, close to 20. The same applies to
creator: RolePlayQueen
